message:
fix(mpp): handle edge cases and prevent panics

- Use total_cmp instead of partial_cmp for NaN-safe timestamp sorting
- Sanitize infinity values in min/max when no events recorded
- Add early return for empty batch in add_batch
- Add dead_code annotation to placeholder CrossExcitationSummary
- Add tests for NaN timestamps, empty batches, and single-event summaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
